sourcesContent:
import React from 'react' import '../styles/home.css' import {Container, Row, Col} from 'reactstrap' import heroImg from '../assets/images/hero-img01.jpg' import heroImg02 from '../assets/images/hero-img02.jpg' import heroVideo from '../assets/images/hero-video.mp4' import worldImg from '../assets/images/world.png' import experienceImg from '../assets/images/experience.png' import Subtitle from '../shared/subtitle.jsx' import SearchBar from '../shared/SearchBar' import ServicesList from '../services/ServicesList' import FeaturedTourList from '../components/Featured-tours/FeaturedTourList' import MasonryImagesGallery from '../components/Image-gallery/MasonryImagesGallery.jsx' const Home = () => { return <> {/* ====== Hero Section Starts====== */}

Traveling opens the door to creating {" "} memories

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Voluptas, ex.
{/* ====== Hero Section Ends====== */}
What we serve

We offer our best services
{/* ====== Features Section Starts====== */}

Featured Tours

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Voluptas, ex.
{/* ====== Features Section Ends====== */} {/* ====== Experience Section Starts====== */}

With our all experience
we will serve you

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet consectetur adipisicing elit. Voluptas, ex.

Successful Trips
12k+

12
Years of Experience
{/* ====== Experience Section Ends====== */} {/* ====== gallery Section Ends====== */}

Visit our customers tour gallery

{/* ====== gallery Section Ends====== */} } export default Home
